title: Switch to list view, sort by Year, paginate and verify item count updates
description: Verifies the user can switch to list view, sort by Year column, and paginate through results with visible item count.

steps.description: Verify a grid of media poster cards is visible
Click the view toggle control to switch to list view
Verify a media items table is visible
Click the "Year" column header to sort
Verify the "Year" column header is visible
Verify the item count display text is visible

v4_reason: Core library browsing (Epic 5) is complete. Epic 7 scanner and Epic 8 subtitle integration are done. Context menu now includes 'Search Subtitles' option.

title: Delete an item from list view and confirm it is removed
description: Verifies deleting a media item from the library via the item action menu removes it from the visible list after confirmation.

steps.description: Click the view toggle control to switch to list view
Verify a media items table is visible
Click the action menu for the first media item in the table
Click "Confirm" in the delete confirmation dialog

v4_reason: Core library browsing (Epic 5) is complete. Delete flow unchanged in v4.

title: Cancel delete from item action menu leaves item intact
description: Verifies canceling the delete confirmation does not remove the item from the library view.

steps.description: Click the view toggle control to switch to list view
Verify a media items table is visible
Click the action menu for the first media item in the table
Click "Cancel" in the delete confirmation dialog
Verify the media items table is still visible

v4_reason: Core library browsing (Epic 5) is complete. Cancel-delete flow unchanged in v4.

title: Filter media by type TV and then clear filter to repopulate results
description: Verifies type filtering can be applied and cleared, and results update accordingly (including empty state when no matches).

steps.description: Verify the type filter control is visible
Select "TV" from the type filter dropdown
Verify text "No media found" is visible
Verify text "No media found" is not visible

v4_reason: Core library filtering (Epic 5) is complete. Filter behavior unchanged in v4.

title: Export a media item from the action menu shows visible confirmation/feedback
description: Verifies the Export action is reachable from an item menu and provides visible UI feedback after triggering export.

steps.description: Verify a grid of media poster cards or a media items table is visible
Click the action menu for the first visible media item

v4_reason: Export from library context menu (Epic 5/6) is complete. Flow unchanged in v4.

title: Pagination previous/next controls behave at boundaries
description: Verifies pagination boundary behavior (e.g., Previous disabled on first page) using visible control states and navigation results.

steps.description: Verify the pagination control is visible
Verify the pagination control is visible

v4_reason: Pagination (Epic 5) is complete. Behavior unchanged in v4.

title: Load qBittorrent settings page and verify form is visible
description: Verifies the qBittorrent settings page loads and shows the key input fields and actions.
v4_reason: QB settings (Epic 4/6) is complete. Settings hub restructuring done. Route /settings/qbittorrent still valid.

title: Successful connection test and save settings
description: Verifies a user can test a valid qBittorrent connection and then save the configuration, seeing success confirmations.
v4_reason: QB connection test flow (Epic 4/6) is complete and unchanged.

title: Verify save confirmation after successful test
description: Verifies the UI shows a clear confirmation that settings were saved after a successful connection test.
v4_reason: QB save confirmation flow (Epic 4/6) is complete and unchanged.

title: Connection test failure shows inline error and guidance
description: Verifies an invalid host causes the connection test to fail and shows an inline error with guidance.
v4_reason: QB error handling flow (Epic 4/6) is complete and unchanged.

title: Save is disabled (or blocked) until a successful test occurs
description: Verifies the user cannot save qBittorrent settings when the last connection test failed or was not successful.
v4_reason: QB save-guard flow (Epic 4/6) is complete and unchanged.

title: Empty host validation prevents connection test
description: Verifies the Host field is required and the UI prevents running a connection test when Host is empty.

steps.description: Verify text "Connection failed" is not visible

v4_reason: QB validation flow (Epic 4/6) is complete and unchanged.

title: Password field masks input
description: Verifies the password input is treated as a password field (masked) and is present for secure entry.
v4_reason: QB password masking (Epic 4/6) is complete and unchanged.

title: Re-test after failure shows updated success state
description: Verifies the UI can recover from a failed test by re-running a successful test and displaying the success result.
v4_reason: QB retry flow (Epic 4/6) is complete and unchanged.

title: Dashboard shows qBittorrent health indicator in Connected state (happy path)
description: Verifies the dashboard renders the QB connection health indicator as connected when backend reports connected.

steps.description: Verify element "qBittorrent connection health indicator" is visible
Verify element "connected (green) state indicator" is visible

v4_reason: Connection health monitoring retained in v4 and will be expanded in Phase 4 (Epic 18). Current tests still valid for QB health indicator.
v4_action: KEEP as-is; expand when Epic 18 adds multi-service health

title: Open connection history modal from the health indicator
description: Verifies clicking the QB health indicator opens the connection history modal UI.

steps.description: Verify element "Connection history modal" is visible

v4_reason: Connection health monitoring retained in v4 and will be expanded in Phase 4 (Epic 18). Current tests still valid for QB health indicator.
v4_action: KEEP as-is; expand when Epic 18 adds multi-service health

title: Connection history modal shows timestamped events list
description: Verifies the history modal displays a list of connection events with visible timestamps.

steps.description: Verify element "Connection history events list" is visible

v4_reason: Connection health monitoring retained in v4 and will be expanded in Phase 4 (Epic 18). Current tests still valid for QB health indicator.
v4_action: KEEP as-is; expand when Epic 18 adds multi-service health

title: Filter connection history to Errors only
description: Verifies the history modal filter for error events narrows the list and shows only error-type entries.

steps.description: Verify text "error" is visible in the connection history events list
Verify text "connected" is not visible in the connection history events list

v4_reason: Connection health monitoring retained in v4 and will be expanded in Phase 4 (Epic 18). Current tests still valid for QB health indicator.
v4_action: KEEP as-is; expand when Epic 18 adds multi-service health

title: Dashboard shows Degraded state when health API reports degraded
description: Verifies the QB health indicator reflects a degraded status when the service is partially unhealthy.

steps.description: Verify element "qBittorrent connection health indicator" is visible
Verify element "degraded state indicator" is visible

v4_reason: Connection health monitoring retained in v4 and will be expanded in Phase 4 (Epic 18). Current tests still valid for QB health indicator.
v4_action: KEEP as-is; expand when Epic 18 adds multi-service health

title: Indicator and modal remain usable after switching filters multiple times
description: Verifies filter toggling does not break the modal and continues to render a consistent event list state.

steps.description: Verify element "Connection history events list" is visible
Verify element "Connection history events list" is visible

v4_reason: Connection health monitoring retained in v4 and will be expanded in Phase 4 (Epic 18). Current tests still valid for QB health indicator.
v4_action: KEEP as-is; expand when Epic 18 adds multi-service health

title: Manual metadata search returns results and can be applied successfully
description: Verifies a user can open Manual Search from the metadata editor, select a search result, apply it, and see updated metadata.

steps.description: Type "Attack on Titan" into the search input field
Click on the first search result item

v4_reason: Manual metadata search (Epic 3) is complete and retained. Subtitle search (Epic 8) adds new entry points but does not alter this flow.

title: Manual search supports multi-source results visibility
description: Verifies manual search results show entries from multiple metadata sources (as grouped sections or source labels).

steps.description: Type "Attack on Titan" into the search input field
Click on the first search result item

v4_reason: Manual metadata search (Epic 3) is complete and retained.

title: Manual search with a specific query returns results list
description: Verifies typing a specific manual search query produces a visible list of matches.

steps.description: Type "Attack on Titan" into the search input field
Click on the first search result item
Type "Attack on Titan S02" into the manual search query input field
Verify element "Manual search results" is visible

v4_reason: Manual metadata search (Epic 3) is complete and retained.

title: Selecting a manual search result shows a confirmation/preview before apply
description: Verifies clicking a manual search result shows a selected state or metadata preview, indicating what will be applied.

steps.description: Type "Attack on Titan" into the search input field
Click on the first search result item
Type "Attack on Titan S02" into the manual search query input field
Click on the first manual search result

v4_reason: Manual metadata search (Epic 3) is complete and retained.

title: Applying a selected manual search result updates metadata shown in the editor
description: Verifies clicking Apply after selecting a manual search result results in visible updated metadata in the editor UI.

steps.description: Type "Attack on Titan" into the search input field
Click on the first search result item
Type "Attack on Titan S02" into the manual search query input field
Click on the first manual search result

v4_reason: Manual metadata search (Epic 3) is complete and retained.

title: Manual search shows 'No matches found' for a rare query
description: Verifies a rare query returns an empty state message instead of results.

steps.description: Type "Attack on Titan" into the search input field
Click on the first search result item
Type "zzzz-no-such-title-12345" into the manual search query input field
Verify text "No matches found" is visible

v4_reason: Manual metadata search (Epic 3) is complete and retained.

title: From 'No matches found', user can choose 'Edit manually' entry point
description: Verifies the empty-state path offers an 'Edit manually' action and opens manual editing UI.

steps.description: Type "Attack on Titan" into the search input field
Click on the first search result item
Type "zzzz-no-such-title-12345" into the manual search query input field

v4_reason: Manual metadata search (Epic 3) is complete and retained.

title: Manual edits can be saved after choosing 'Edit manually'
description: Verifies a user can make a manual edit and save it after no search results are found.

steps.description: Type "Attack on Titan" into the search input field
Click on the first search result item
Type "zzzz-no-such-title-12345" into the manual search query input field
Type "Test Title Override" into the "Title" field

v4_reason: Manual metadata search (Epic 3) is complete and retained.

title: Learned Patterns list loads and shows list + stats sections
description: Verifies the Learned Patterns UI loads from Settings and displays expected list and statistics areas.

steps.description: Verify element "Learned Patterns list" is visible

v4_reason: Pattern learning (Epic 3) is done and retained in v4. No significant changes planned.

title: Learned Patterns list supports empty state when no patterns exist
description: Verifies the UI provides a clear empty state when there are no learned patterns to display.

steps.description: Verify one of the following is visible: text "No learned patterns" or text "No patterns" or text "Nothing to show"
Verify element "Learned Patterns list" is visible

v4_reason: Pattern learning (Epic 3) is done and retained in v4. No significant changes planned.

title: Learned Patterns row renders required fields (pattern + usage stats)
description: Verifies a learned pattern entry shows a recognizable pattern identifier and usage-related statistics in the list.

steps.description: Verify element "A learned pattern row" is visible
Verify one of the following is visible within the patterns area: text "Uses" or text "Usage" or text "Matched"

v4_reason: Pattern learning (Epic 3) is done and retained in v4. No significant changes planned.

title: Delete learned pattern success removes it from the list
description: Verifies deleting a learned pattern removes the entry from the Learned Patterns list after successful deletion.

steps.description: Verify element "A learned pattern row" is visible
Click on "Delete" for the first learned pattern row
Verify text "Unable to delete pattern" is not visible
Verify element "The deleted learned pattern row" is not visible

v4_reason: Pattern learning (Epic 3) is done and retained in v4. No significant changes planned.

title: Delete action can be cancelled if a confirmation is shown
description: Verifies that if the UI shows a delete confirmation prompt/modal, cancelling does not remove the pattern.

steps.description: Verify element "A learned pattern row" is visible
Click on "Delete" for a learned pattern row
Click on "Cancel" in the delete confirmation
Verify element "A learned pattern row" is visible

v4_reason: Pattern learning (Epic 3) is done and retained in v4. No significant changes planned.

title: Learned Patterns statistics update/refresh is reflected on the page
description: Verifies the statistics area can be refreshed (via visible refresh control if present) and remains visible after update.

steps.description: Click on "Refresh" in the Learned Patterns or Statistics area
Verify element "Learned Patterns list" is visible

v4_reason: Pattern learning (Epic 3) is done and retained in v4. No significant changes planned.

title: Scanner settings page loads with folder list, schedule selector, and last scan info
description: Verifies the scanner settings page renders all key sections: configured media folders, schedule dropdown, last scan info, and scan trigger button.

steps.description: Verify element with data-testid "scanner-settings" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "folder-list" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "schedule-select" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "last-scan-info" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-trigger-button" is visible

v4_reason: Scanner settings (Epic 7) is complete. All components verified with data-testid attributes.

title: Trigger manual scan and verify progress card appears (desktop)
description: Verifies clicking 'Scan Now' initiates a scan and the floating progress card appears at bottom-right with progress bar and file counters.

steps.description: Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-bar" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-current-file" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-eta" is visible

v4_reason: Scanner progress card (Epic 7, Story 7-4) is complete with SSE-driven real-time updates.

title: Minimize scan progress card to pill and expand back
description: Verifies the scan progress card can be minimized to a compact pill indicator and expanded back to the full card.

steps.description: Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-pill" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is not visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is visible

v4_reason: Scanner minimize/expand (Epic 7, Story 7-4) is complete.

title: Cancel active scan with confirmation dialog
description: Verifies the user can cancel an active scan through a confirmation dialog, and the scan stops.

steps.description: Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "cancel-confirm-dialog" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is not visible or shows cancelled state

v4_reason: Scan cancellation (Epic 7, Story 7-4) is complete with confirmation dialog.

title: Cancel confirmation can be dismissed to continue scanning
description: Verifies clicking 'Continue' in the cancel confirmation dialog dismisses the dialog and scanning continues.

steps.description: Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "cancel-confirm-dialog" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "cancel-confirm-dialog" is not visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is visible

v4_reason: Scan cancel-dismiss flow (Epic 7, Story 7-4) is complete.

title: Configure scan schedule to daily and verify selection persists
description: Verifies changing the scan schedule dropdown to 'daily' saves the selection and it persists on page reload.

steps.description: Verify element with data-testid "schedule-select" shows "daily" as selected value
Verify element with data-testid "schedule-select" shows "daily" as selected value

v4_reason: Scheduled scan (Epic 7, Story 7-2) is complete.

title: Scan progress visible on non-settings pages (global progress card)
description: Verifies the scan progress card is visible on the library page during an active scan, since it renders in the root layout.

steps.description: Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-wrapper" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is visible

v4_reason: Global scan progress (Epic 7, Story 7-4) renders in __root.tsx for all pages.

title: Scan completion shows auto-dismiss card with results
description: Verifies that when a scan completes, the progress card shows completion state with dismiss button and auto-dismiss animation.

steps.description: Verify element with data-testid "scan-progress-card" is visible
Wait for scan to complete (scan-progress-bar reaches 100%)
Verify element with data-testid "auto-dismiss-bar" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "scan-dismiss-btn" is visible

v4_reason: Scan completion with auto-dismiss (Epic 7, Story 7-4) is complete with CSS keyframe animation.

title: Open subtitle search dialog from library context menu
description: Verifies a user can right-click a media item in the library, select 'Search Subtitles', and the subtitle search dialog opens with provider checkboxes and search input.

steps.description: Verify a grid of media poster cards is visible
Right-click the first media poster card to open context menu
Click "Search Subtitles" in the context menu
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-search-dialog" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-search-input" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-search-btn" is visible

v4_reason: Subtitle search dialog (Epic 8, Story 8-8) is complete with multi-source provider integration.

title: Subtitle search shows provider checkboxes and returns scored results
description: Verifies the subtitle search dialog shows provider selection checkboxes (Assrt, OpenSubtitles, Zimuku) and executing a search returns a results table with score badges.

steps.description: Right-click the first media poster card to open context menu
Click "Search Subtitles" in the context menu
Verify element with data-testid "provider-assrt" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "provider-opensubtitles" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "provider-zimuku" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-results-table" is visible

v4_reason: Subtitle provider selection and scored results (Epic 8, Stories 8-1/8-2/8-3/8-6) are complete.

title: Subtitle search shows empty state when no results found
description: Verifies searching for subtitles with a query that yields no results shows the empty state message.

steps.description: Right-click the first media poster card to open context menu
Click "Search Subtitles" in the context menu
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-search-dialog" is visible
Clear the search input and type "zzzzz-no-subtitles-exist-99999"
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-empty-state" is visible

v4_reason: Subtitle search empty state (Epic 8, Story 8-8) is complete.

title: Preview subtitle content before downloading
description: Verifies clicking the preview button on a subtitle result shows the first lines of subtitle content with detected language.

steps.description: Right-click the first media poster card to open context menu
Click "Search Subtitles" in the context menu
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-results-table" is visible
Click the first visible element matching data-testid pattern "preview-btn-*"
Verify subtitle preview content area is visible showing text lines

v4_reason: Subtitle preview (Epic 8, Story 8-8) is complete with language detection display.

title: Download subtitle with CN conversion toggle
description: Verifies the CN conversion toggle is visible, and downloading a subtitle triggers the multi-stage SSE progress flow (downloading, converting, placing, complete).

steps.description: Right-click the first media poster card to open context menu
Click "Search Subtitles" in the context menu
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-results-table" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "convert-toggle" is visible
Click the first visible element matching data-testid pattern "download-btn-*"
Verify download progress indication is visible (downloading stage text or spinner)

v4_reason: Subtitle download with CN conversion (Epic 8, Stories 8-5/8-7/8-8/8-10) is complete with SSE multi-stage progress.

title: Close subtitle search dialog with Escape key
description: Verifies the subtitle search dialog can be dismissed by pressing the Escape key.

steps.description: Right-click the first media poster card to open context menu
Click "Search Subtitles" in the context menu
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-search-dialog" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-search-dialog" is not visible

v4_reason: Subtitle dialog dismiss (Epic 8, Story 8-8) is complete.

title: Open subtitle search from media detail panel
description: Verifies the subtitle search dialog can be opened from the media detail panel's 'Search Subtitles' button.

steps.description: Click the first media poster card to open detail panel
Verify element "media detail side panel" is visible
Click "Search Subtitles" button in the detail panel
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-search-dialog" is visible
Verify element with data-testid "subtitle-search-input" contains the media title as default value

v4_reason: Subtitle search from detail panel (Epic 8, Story 8-8) is complete. Dialog pre-fills media title.

title: Library context menu shows 'Search Subtitles' option alongside existing actions
description: Verifies the library context menu includes 'Search Subtitles' as an action item alongside Re-parse and Delete.

steps.description: Verify a grid of media poster cards is visible
Right-click the first media poster card to open context menu
Verify text "Search Subtitles" is visible in the context menu
Verify text "Re-parse" is visible in the context menu
Verify text "Delete" is visible in the context menu

v4_reason: Context menu with subtitle search (Epic 8 integration into Epic 5 library) is complete.
